---
title: "lab2"
author: "Kalle Stoffers"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

Last compiled on `r format(Sys.time(), '%B, %Y')`

<br>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## First look at CBS data

Relevant packages

```{r message=FALSE}
library (tidyverse)
```

```{r}

```
